name: gemma4-12b-mlx-vs-llamacpp-short

summary: The same matched-quant engine test, sustained-decode regime.

summary: The two official Ollama tags as shipped (not matched-quant); one-shot regime.

name: gemma4-12b-qat-vs-standard-q4-short
title: gemma-4 12B: QAT Q4 vs standard Q4 - short prompt (matched UD-Q4_K_XL)

name: gemma4-12b-qat-vs-standard-q4-long
title: gemma-4 12B: QAT Q4 vs standard Q4 - long prompt (matched UD-Q4_K_XL)
summary: The same QAT-vs-PTQ test, sustained-decode regime - where the smaller QAT model's lower bytes-per-token should show its clearest energy/token edge.
